segments.text: And uh, we are going to even it out. 0-0.
That's some big damage though, from acola.
I don't know what's happening, all the games are switched and they don't know where I am, it's so hard.
I don't know, we got a super caster, how can you guys do this to me?

full_text: And uh, we are going to even it out. 0-0. That's some big damage though, from acola. I don't know. I don't know what's happening, all the games are switched and they don't know where I am, it's so hard. I don't know, we got a super caster, how can you guys do this to me? I feel like...
